testsuite.name: scripting-revamp-coll/json-response-test

failure.message: Expected "{}" to include "Open source API development ecosystem"

failure.message: Expected "{}" to include "Open source API development ecosystem"

`pm.variables.replaceIn()` resolves template variables - Expected 'Value is test_value' to be 'Value is test_value'

`pm.globals.get()` retrieves global environment variables - Expected 'global_value' to be 'global_value'
`hopp.env.active.get()` retrieves active environment variables - Expected 'active_value' to be 'active_value'
`pm.environment.get()` retrieves active environment variables - Expected 'active_value' to be 'active_value'

testcase.name: pm.response.cookies API contract - all methods exist - Expected {} to be an object
pm.response.cookies API contract - all methods exist - Expected function to equal function
pm.response.cookies API contract - all methods exist - Expected function to equal function
pm.response.cookies API contract - all methods exist - Expected function to equal function
pm.response.cookies.toObject() returns proper structure - Expected {} to be an object
pm.response.cookies.toObject() returns proper structure - Expected 'object' to equal 'object'
pm.response.cookies.has() returns boolean for cookie checks - Expected false to be a boolean
pm.response.cookies.get() returns null for non-existent cookies - Expected null to be null
pm.response.cookies API integrates with response object - Expected 400 to equal 200
pm.response.cookies API integrates with response object - Expected {code: 400, status: 'Bad Request', responseTime: 0, responseSize: 2, stream: {0: 123, 1: 125}} to have property 'cookies'
pm.response.cookies API integrates with response object - Expected {} to not be null
pm.response.cookies API integrates with response object - Expected {} to not be undefined
Request cookies are properly sent via Cookie header - Expected 'session_id=abc123; user_token=xyz789; preferences=theme%3Ddark' to be a string
Request cookies are properly sent via Cookie header - Expected 'session_id=abc123; user_token=xyz789; preferences=theme%3Ddark' to include 'session_id'
Request cookies are properly sent via Cookie header - Expected 'session_id=abc123; user_token=xyz789; preferences=theme%3Ddark' to include 'user_token'
pm.response.to.have.cookie() assertion method exists - Expected function to equal function
hopp.cookies API contract matches pm.response.cookies - Expected 'object' to be 'object'
hopp.cookies API contract matches pm.response.cookies - Expected 'function' to be 'function'
hopp.cookies API contract matches pm.response.cookies - Expected 'function' to be 'function'

testcase.name: pm.environment.name returns environment identifier - Expected 'active' to be a string
pm.environment.name returns environment identifier - Expected 'active' to equal 'active'
pm.environment.replaceIn() resolves template variables - Expected 'Hello world, user 12345!' to equal 'Hello world, user 12345!'
pm.globals.replaceIn() resolves global template variables - Expected 'https://api.example.com/v2/users' to equal 'https://api.example.com/v2/users'

pm.environment.toObject() returns all environment variables - Expected {test_key: 'test_value', recursive_key: 'test_value', active_key: 'active_value', pm_test_key: 'pm_test_value', pm_active_key: 'pm_active_value'} to be an object

pm.environment.toObject() returns all environment variables - Expected {test_key: 'test_value', recursive_key: 'test_value', active_key: 'active_value', pm_test_key: 'pm_test_value', pm_active_key: 'pm_active_value'} to have property 'template_var', 'world'

pm.environment.toObject() returns all environment variables - Expected {test_key: 'test_value', recursive_key: 'test_value', active_key: 'active_value', pm_test_key: 'pm_test_value', pm_active_key: 'pm_active_value'} to have property 'user_id', '12345'

pm.globals.toObject() returns all global variables - Expected {global_key: 'global_value', pm_global_key: 'pm_global_value', pm_global_pre: 'pm_global_pre_value', api_base: 'https://api.example.com', version: 'v2'} to be an object

pm.globals.toObject() returns all global variables - Expected {global_key: 'global_value', pm_global_key: 'pm_global_value', pm_global_pre: 'pm_global_pre_value', api_base: 'https://api.example.com', version: 'v2'} to have property 'api_base'

pm.variables.toObject() returns combined variables with precedence - Expected {global_key: 'global_value', pm_global_key: 'pm_global_value', pm_global_pre: 'pm_global_pre_value', api_base: 'https://api.example.com', version: 'v2'} to be an object

pm.variables.toObject() returns combined variables with precedence - Expected {global_key: 'global_value', pm_global_key: 'pm_global_value', pm_global_pre: 'pm_global_pre_value', api_base: 'https://api.example.com', version: 'v2'} to have property 'template_var'
pm.environment.clear() removes all environment variables - Expected 0 to equal 0
pm.response.responseSize returns response body size in bytes - Expected 2 to be a number
pm.response.responseSize returns response body size in bytes - Expected 2 to be above 0
pm.response.responseSize matches actual body length - Expected 2 to equal 2
Response size is calculated correctly for JSON payload - Expected 2 to be a number
pm.execution.location provides execution path - Expected ['Hoppscotch'] to be an array
pm.execution.location provides execution path - Expected 1 to be above 0
pm.execution.location.current returns current location - Expected 'Hoppscotch' to be a string
pm.execution.location.current returns current location - Expected 'Hoppscotch' to equal 'Hoppscotch'
pm.execution.location is immutable - Expected () => { location.push('test') } to throw
pm.response.to.have.status() validates exact status code - Expected 400 to equal 200
pm.response.to.have.status() validates exact status code - Expected 400 to equal 200
pm.response.to.be.ok validates 2xx status codes - Expected false to be true
pm.response.to.be.success validates 2xx status codes (alias) - Expected false to be true
pm.response.to.have.header() validates response headers - Expected undefined to exist
pm.response.to.have.header() validates response headers - Expected false to be true
pm.response.to.have.jsonBody() validates JSON response - Expected {} to be an object
pm.response.to.have.jsonBody() validates JSON response - Expected {} to have property 'data'
pm.response.to.have.jsonBody() validates JSON response - Expected {} to have property 'data'
pm.response.to.be.json validates JSON content type - Expected '' to include 'application/json'
pm.response.to.have.responseTime assertions - Expected 0 to be below 5000
pm.response.to.have.responseTime assertions - Expected 0 to be a number
pm.response.to.have.responseTime assertions - Expected 0 to be above 0
pm.expect().to.include() validates string inclusion - Expected 'hello world' to include 'world'
pm.expect().to.include() validates string inclusion - Expected 'hello world' to include 'hello'
pm.expect().to.include() validates string inclusion - Expected 'test string' to not include 'missing'
pm.expect().to.contain() validates array inclusion - Expected [1, 2, 3] to include 2
pm.expect().to.contain() validates array inclusion - Expected [1, 2, 3] to include 1
pm.expect().to.contain() validates array inclusion - Expected ['a', 'b', 'c'] to include 'b'
pm.expect().to.includes() alias works - Expected 'testing' to include 'test'
pm.expect().to.includes() alias works - Expected [10, 20, 30] to include 20
pm.expect().to.contains() alias works - Expected 'contains test' to include 'contains'
pm.expect().to.contains() alias works - Expected [true, false] to include true
include/contain with response data - Expected {} to have property 'data'
include/contain with response data - Expected '{}' to include 'includeTest'
hopp.expect() also supports toInclude() - Expected "hopp test" to include "hopp"
hopp.expect() also supports toInclude() - Expected [1,2] to include 1
pm.environment.unset() removes specific variables - Expected true to be true
pm.environment.unset() removes specific variables - Expected false to be false
pm.environment.unset() removes specific variables - Expected undefined to be undefined
pm.environment.unset() handles non-existent keys gracefully - Expected false to be false
pm.globals.unset() removes specific global variables - Expected false to be false
pm.environment.clear() removes ALL environment variables - Expected true to be true
pm.environment.clear() removes ALL environment variables - Expected true to be true
pm.environment.clear() removes ALL environment variables - Expected true to be true
pm.environment.clear() removes ALL environment variables - Expected 0 to equal 0
pm.environment.clear() removes ALL environment variables - Expected false to be false
pm.environment.clear() removes ALL environment variables - Expected false to be false
pm.environment.clear() removes ALL environment variables - Expected false to be false
pm.globals.clear() removes ALL global variables - Expected 0 to equal 0

pm.request.url string assignment was applied - Expected 'https://echo.hoppscotch.io/mutated-via-string' to not include '/original'

pm.request.method mutation was applied - Expected 'POST' to not equal 'GET'
pm.request.headers.add() added new header - Expected true to be true
pm.request.headers.add() added new header - Expected 'added-value' to equal 'added-value'
pm.request.headers.upsert() updated existing header - Expected true to be true
pm.request.headers.upsert() updated existing header - Expected 'mutated-value' to equal 'mutated-value'
pm.request.headers.upsert() updated existing header - Expected 'mutated-value' to not equal 'original'

pm.request.body.update() changed body content - Expected '{"pmMutated":true,"timestamp":1774102301039}' to include 'pmMutated'
pm.request.body.update() changed body content - Expected true to be true

pm.request.auth mutation was applied - Expected 'pm-bearer-token-123' to equal 'pm-bearer-token-123'

pm.request.id and pm.request.name are accessible - Expected 'pm-request-mutation-test' to equal 'pm-request-mutation-test'

hopp.request reflects pm namespace mutations - Expected 'true' to be 'true'

URL path mutation works - Expected ['v2', 'test'] to include 'test'

pm.info.iterationCount throws descriptive error - Expected () => { const x = pm.info.iterationCount } to throw /Collection Runner feature/

URL helper methods - getPath() returns path with leading slash - Expected '/updated' to equal '/updated'
URL helper methods - getPathWithQuery() includes query string - Expected '/updated?page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata' to include '?'
URL helper methods - getPathWithQuery() includes query string - Expected '/updated?page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata' to include 'page=1'
URL helper methods - getPathWithQuery() includes query string - Expected '/updated?page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata' to include 'limit=20'
URL helper methods - getQueryString() returns query without ? - Expected 'page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata' to be a string
URL helper methods - getQueryString() returns query without ? - Expected 'page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata' to not include '?'
URL helper methods - getQueryString() returns query without ? - Expected 'page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata' to include 'page=1'
URL helper methods - getRemote() returns host with port - Expected 'echo.hoppscotch.io' to be a string
URL helper methods - getRemote() returns host with port - Expected 'echo.hoppscotch.io' to equal 'echo.hoppscotch.io'
URL helper methods - update() changes entire URL - Expected 'https://echo.hoppscotch.io/updated?page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata#results' to include 'echo.hoppscotch.io'
URL helper methods - update() changes entire URL - Expected 'https://echo.hoppscotch.io/updated?page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata#results' to include '/updated'
URL helper methods - addQueryParams() adds multiple params - Expected {page: '1', limit: '20', status: 'published', include: 'metadata'} to have property 'page', '1'
URL helper methods - addQueryParams() adds multiple params - Expected {page: '1', limit: '20', status: 'published', include: 'metadata'} to have property 'limit', '20'
URL helper methods - removeQueryParams() removes params - Expected {page: '1', limit: '20', status: 'published', include: 'metadata'} to not have property 'test'
URL properties - hostname getter returns string - Expected 'echo.hoppscotch.io' to be a string
URL properties - hostname getter returns string - Expected 'echo.hoppscotch.io' to equal 'echo.hoppscotch.io'
URL properties - hostname matches host array - Expected 'echo.hoppscotch.io' to equal 'echo.hoppscotch.io'
URL properties - hash getter returns string - Expected 'results' to be a string
Query PropertyList - get() retrieves parameter value - Expected '1' to equal '1'
Query PropertyList - has() checks parameter existence - Expected true to be true
Query PropertyList - has() checks parameter existence - Expected false to be false
Query PropertyList - upsert() adds/updates parameter - Expected true to be true
Query PropertyList - upsert() adds/updates parameter - Expected 'published' to equal 'published'
Query PropertyList - count() returns parameter count - Expected 4 to be a number
Query PropertyList - count() returns parameter count - Expected 4 to be above 0
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected {key: 'page', value: '1'} to have property 'key'
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected {key: 'page', value: '1'} to have property 'value'
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected {key: 'limit', value: '20'} to have property 'key'
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected {key: 'limit', value: '20'} to have property 'value'
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected {key: 'status', value: 'published'} to have property 'key'
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected {key: 'status', value: 'published'} to have property 'value'
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected {key: 'include', value: 'metadata'} to have property 'key'
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected {key: 'include', value: 'metadata'} to have property 'value'
Query PropertyList - each() iterates over parameters - Expected 4 to be above 0
Query PropertyList - map() transforms parameters - Expected ['page', 'limit', 'status', 'include'] to be an array
Query PropertyList - map() transforms parameters - Expected ['page', 'limit', 'status', 'include'] to include 'page'
Query PropertyList - map() transforms parameters - Expected ['page', 'limit', 'status', 'include'] to include 'limit'
Query PropertyList - filter() filters parameters - Expected [{key: 'page', value: '1'}] to be an array
Query PropertyList - filter() filters parameters - Expected 1 to be above 0
Query PropertyList - filter() filters parameters - Expected 'page' to equal 'page'
Query PropertyList - idx() accesses by index - Expected {key: 'page', value: '1'} to be an object
Query PropertyList - idx() accesses by index - Expected {key: 'page', value: '1'} to have property 'key'
Query PropertyList - idx() accesses by index - Expected {key: 'page', value: '1'} to have property 'value'
Query PropertyList - idx() returns null for out of bounds - Expected null to be null
Query PropertyList - toObject() returns object - Expected {page: '1', limit: '20', status: 'published', include: 'metadata'} to be an object
Query PropertyList - toObject() returns object - Expected {page: '1', limit: '20', status: 'published', include: 'metadata'} to have property 'page'
Headers PropertyList - each() iterates over headers - Expected {key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json', active: true, description: ''} to have property 'key'
Headers PropertyList - each() iterates over headers - Expected {key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json', active: true, description: ''} to have property 'value'
Headers PropertyList - each() iterates over headers - Expected {key: 'Authorization', value: 'Bearer test-token', active: true, description: ''} to have property 'key'
Headers PropertyList - each() iterates over headers - Expected {key: 'Authorization', value: 'Bearer test-token', active: true, description: ''} to have property 'value'
Headers PropertyList - each() iterates over headers - Expected 2 to be above 0
Headers PropertyList - map() transforms headers - Expected ['Content-Type', 'Authorization'] to be an array
Headers PropertyList - map() transforms headers - Expected ['Content-Type', 'Authorization'] to include 'Content-Type'
Headers PropertyList - filter() filters headers - Expected [{key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json', active: true, description: ''}] to be an array
Headers PropertyList - filter() filters headers - Expected 1 to be above 0
Headers PropertyList - count() returns header count - Expected 2 to be a number
Headers PropertyList - count() returns header count - Expected 2 to be above 0
Headers PropertyList - idx() accesses by index - Expected {key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json', active: true, description: ''} to be an object
Headers PropertyList - idx() accesses by index - Expected {key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json', active: true, description: ''} to have property 'key'
Headers PropertyList - toObject() returns object - Expected {Content-Type: 'application/json', Authorization: 'Bearer test-token'} to be an object
Headers PropertyList - toObject() returns object - Expected {Content-Type: 'application/json', Authorization: 'Bearer test-token'} to have property 'Content-Type'
hopp namespace URL methods work identically - Expected "https://echo.hoppscotch.io/updated?page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata#results" to include "echo.hoppscotch.io"
hopp namespace URL methods work identically - Expected "https://echo.hoppscotch.io/updated?page=1&limit=20&status=published&include=metadata#results" to include "/updated"
query.find() - finds param by string key - Expected {key: 'limit', value: '10'} to be an object
query.find() - finds param by string key - Expected 'limit' to equal 'limit'
query.find() - finds param by predicate function - Expected {key: 'limit', value: '10'} to be an object
query.find() - finds param by predicate function - Expected '10' to equal '10'
query.find() - returns null when not found - Expected null to be null
query.indexOf() - returns index for existing params - Expected 0 to be a number
query.indexOf() - returns index for existing params - Expected 0 to be at least 0
query.indexOf() - returns index by object - Expected 0 to be a number
query.indexOf() - returns index by object - Expected 0 to be at least 0
query.indexOf() - returns -1 when not found - Expected -1 to equal -1
query.insert/append/assimilate - methods executed successfully - Expected {filter: 'active', sort: 'name', limit: '10', page: '1', offset: '0'} to be an object
query.insert/append/assimilate - methods executed successfully - Expected true to be true
query.insert/append/assimilate - methods executed successfully - Expected true to be true
query.append() - adds param at end - Expected 4 to be at least 0
query.append() - adds param at end - Expected '0' to equal '0'
query.assimilate() - adds/updates params - Expected true to be true
query.assimilate() - adds/updates params - Expected 'metadata' to equal 'metadata'
query.assimilate() - adds/updates params - Expected true to be true
query.assimilate() - adds/updates params - Expected 'active' to equal 'active'
headers.find() - finds header by string (case-insensitive) - Expected {key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json', active: true, description: ''} to be an object
headers.find() - finds header by string (case-insensitive) - Expected 'Content-Type' to equal 'Content-Type'
headers.find() - finds header by predicate function - Expected {key: 'Authorization', value: 'Bearer token123', active: true, description: ''} to be an object
headers.find() - finds header by predicate function - Expected 'Bearer token123' to include 'Bearer'
headers.find() - returns null when not found - Expected null to be null
headers.indexOf() - returns correct index (case-insensitive) - Expected 2 to be a number
headers.indexOf() - returns correct index (case-insensitive) - Expected 2 to be at least 0
headers.indexOf() - returns correct index by object - Expected 0 to be a number
headers.indexOf() - returns correct index by object - Expected 0 to be at least 0
headers.indexOf() - returns -1 when not found - Expected -1 to equal -1
headers.insert() - inserts header before specified header - Expected 1 to be below 2
headers.append() - adds header at end - Expected true to be true
headers.append() - adds header at end - Expected 'req-456' to equal 'req-456'
headers.assimilate() - adds/updates headers - Expected true to be true
headers.assimilate() - adds/updates headers - Expected 'custom-value' to equal 'custom-value'
query PropertyList - all methods work together - Expected {filter: 'active', sort: 'name', limit: '10', page: '1', offset: '0'} to be an object
query PropertyList - all methods work together - Expected 7 to be at least 4

headers PropertyList - all methods work together - Expected {Content-Type: 'application/json', X-API-Key: 'secret123', Authorization: 'Bearer token123', X-Request-ID: 'req-456', X-Custom-Header: 'custom-value'} to be an object
headers PropertyList - all methods work together - Expected 5 to be at least 5
pm.response.reason() returns HTTP reason phrase - Expected 'Bad Request' to be a string
pm.response.reason() returns HTTP reason phrase - Expected 'Bad Request' to equal 'OK'
hopp.response.reason() returns HTTP reason phrase - Expected '' to be type 'string'
hopp.response.reason() returns HTTP reason phrase - Expected '' to be 'OK'
pm.response.dataURI() converts response to data URI - Expected 'data:application/octet-stream;base64,W29iamVjdCBPYmplY3Rd' to be a string
pm.response.dataURI() converts response to data URI - Expected 'data:application/octet-stream;base64,W29iamVjdCBPYmplY3Rd' to include 'data:'
pm.response.dataURI() converts response to data URI - Expected 'data:application/octet-stream;base64,W29iamVjdCBPYmplY3Rd' to include 'base64'
hopp.response.dataURI() converts response to data URI - Expected 'data:application/octet-stream;base64,e30=' to be type 'string'
hopp.response.dataURI() converts response to data URI - Expected 'true' to be 'true'
pm.expect().to.have.nested.property() accesses nested properties - Expected {a: {b: {c: 'deep value'}}} to have nested property 'a.b.c', 'deep value'
pm.expect().to.have.nested.property() accesses nested properties - Expected {a: {b: {c: 'deep value'}}} to have nested property 'a.b'
hopp.expect().to.have.nested.property() accesses nested properties - Expected {x: {y: {z: 'nested'}}} to have nested property 'x.y.z', 'nested'
hopp.expect().to.have.nested.property() accesses nested properties - Expected {x: {y: {z: 'nested'}}} to have nested property 'x.y'
pm.expect().to.have.nested.property() handles arrays - Expected {items: [{name: 'first'}, {name: 'second'}]} to have nested property 'items[0].name', 'first'
pm.expect().to.have.nested.property() handles arrays - Expected {items: [{name: 'first'}, {name: 'second'}]} to have nested property 'items[1].name', 'second'
pm.expect().to.not.have.nested.property() negation works - Expected {a: {b: 'value'}} to not have nested property 'a.c'
pm.expect().to.not.have.nested.property() negation works - Expected {a: {b: 'value'}} to not have nested property 'x.y.z'
pm.expect().to.change().by() validates exact delta - Expected [Function] to change {}.'value' by 15
hopp.expect().to.change().by() validates exact delta - Expected [Function] to change {}.'val' by 50
pm.expect().to.increase().by() validates exact increase - Expected [Function] to increase {}.'count' by 7
pm.expect().to.decrease().by() validates exact decrease - Expected [Function] to decrease {}.'score' by 30
pm.expect().to.change().by() with negative delta - Expected [Function] to change {}.'value' by -30
Map assertions - size property - Expected {size: 2} to have property 'size', 2
Map assertions - size property - Expected 2 to equal 2
Set assertions - size property - Expected {size: 4} to have property 'size', 4
Set assertions - size property - Expected 4 to equal 4
Map instanceOf assertion - Expected new Map() to be an instanceof Map
Map instanceOf assertion - Expected new Map() to be an instanceof Map
Set instanceOf assertion - Expected new Set() to be an instanceof Set
Set instanceOf assertion - Expected new Set() to be an instanceof Set
closeTo - validates numbers within delta - Expected 3.14159 to be closeTo 3.14, 0.01
closeTo - validates numbers within delta - Expected 10.5 to be closeTo 11, 1
closeTo - negation works - Expected 100 to not be closeTo 50, 10
closeTo - negation works - Expected 3.14 to not be closeTo 10, 0.1
approximately - alias for closeTo - Expected 2.5 to approximately 2.4, 0.2
approximately - alias for closeTo - Expected 99.99 to approximately 100, 0.1
finite - validates finite numbers - Expected 123 to be finite
finite - validates finite numbers - Expected 0 to be finite
finite - validates finite numbers - Expected -456 to be finite
finite - negation for Infinity - Expected Infinity to not be finite
finite - negation for Infinity - Expected -Infinity to not be finite
finite - negation for Infinity - Expected NaN to not be finite
satisfy - custom predicate function - Expected 10 to satisfy (num) => num > 5
satisfy - custom predicate function - Expected 'hello' to satisfy (str) => str.length === 5
satisfy - complex validation - Expected {name: 'test', value: 100} to satisfy (o) => o.value > 50 && o.name.length > 0
satisfy - negation works - Expected 5 to not satisfy (num) => num > 10
satisfy - negation works - Expected 'abc' to not satisfy (str) => str.length > 5
own.property - distinguishes own vs inherited - Expected {own: true} to have own property 'own'
own.property - distinguishes own vs inherited - Expected {own: true} to not have own property 'inherited'
own.property - distinguishes own vs inherited - Expected {own: true} to have property 'inherited'
deep.own.property - deep check with ownership - Expected {data: {nested: 'value'}} to have deep own property 'data', {nested: 'value'}
deep.own.property - deep check with ownership - Expected {data: {nested: 'value'}} to not have deep own property 'shared'
ownProperty - alias for own.property - Expected {prop: 'value'} to have own property 'prop'
ownProperty - alias for own.property - Expected {prop: 'value'} to have own property 'prop'
hopp.expect Map/Set support - Expected '1' to be '1'
hopp.expect Map/Set support - Expected '2' to be '2'
hopp.expect closeTo support - Expected 3.14 to be closeTo 3.1, 0.1
hopp.expect closeTo support - Expected 10 to be closeTo 10.5, 1
hopp.expect finite support - Expected 42 to be finite
hopp.expect finite support - Expected Infinity to not be finite
hopp.expect satisfy support - Expected 100 to satisfy (n) => n > 50
hopp.expect satisfy support - Expected 'test' to satisfy (s) => s.length === 4
hopp.expect respondTo support - Expected 'class TestClass { method() {} }' to respondTo 'method'
hopp.expect own.property support - Expected {own: 2} to have own property 'own'
hopp.expect own.property support - Expected {own: 2} to not have own property 'inherited'
hopp.expect ordered.members support - Expected ['a', 'b', 'c'] to have ordered members ['a', 'b', 'c']
string values work across scripts - Expected 'hello' to equal 'hello'
numbers are preserved as numbers (same script) - Expected 42 to equal 42
numbers are preserved as numbers (same script) - Expected 'number' to equal 'number'
booleans are preserved as booleans (same script) - Expected true to equal true
booleans are preserved as booleans (same script) - Expected false to equal false
booleans are preserved as booleans (same script) - Expected 'boolean' to equal 'boolean'
null is preserved as actual null (same script) - Expected null to equal null
null is preserved as actual null (same script) - Expected true to be true
null is preserved as actual null (same script) - Expected 'object' to equal 'object'
undefined is preserved as actual undefined (same script) - Expected undefined to equal undefined
undefined is preserved as actual undefined (same script) - Expected 'undefined' to equal 'undefined'
undefined is preserved as actual undefined (same script) - Expected true to be true
arrays are preserved with direct access - Expected true to be true
arrays are preserved with direct access - Expected 3 to equal 3
arrays are preserved with direct access - Expected 1 to equal 1
arrays are preserved with direct access - Expected 3 to equal 3
single-element arrays remain arrays - Expected true to be true
single-element arrays remain arrays - Expected 1 to equal 1
single-element arrays remain arrays - Expected 42 to equal 42
empty arrays are preserved - Expected true to be true
empty arrays are preserved - Expected 0 to equal 0
string arrays preserve all elements - Expected true to be true
string arrays preserve all elements - Expected ['a', 'b', 'c'] to deep equal ['a', 'b', 'c']
objects are preserved with accessible properties - Expected 'object' to equal 'object'
objects are preserved with accessible properties - Expected 'value' to equal 'value'
objects are preserved with accessible properties - Expected 123 to equal 123
empty objects are preserved - Expected 'object' to equal 'object'
empty objects are preserved - Expected 0 to equal 0
nested objects preserve structure - Expected 'John' to equal 'John'
nested objects preserve structure - Expected 1 to equal 1
nested objects preserve structure - Expected true to equal true
complex nested structures work - Expected [{id: 1, name: 'Alice', scores: [90, 85, 88]}, {id: 2, name: 'Bob', scores: [75, 80, 82]}] to be an array
complex nested structures work - Expected 2 to equal 2
complex nested structures work - Expected 'Alice' to equal 'Alice'
complex nested structures work - Expected 90 to equal 90
complex nested structures work - Expected ['active', 'verified'] to deep equal ['active', 'verified']
hopp.env.set rejects non-string values - Expected 6 to equal 6
hopp.env.set only accepts strings - Expected 'valid' to equal 'valid'
pm/hopp cross-namespace reading works - Expected true to be true
pm/hopp cross-namespace reading works - Expected 3 to equal 3
no JSON.parse needed for response data storage - Expected 123 to equal 123
no JSON.parse needed for response data storage - Expected ['read', 'write'] to include 'write'
no JSON.parse needed for response data storage - Expected 'dark' to equal 'dark'
array iteration works directly - Expected 'applebananacherry' to equal 'applebananacherry'
array iteration works directly - Expected ['APPLE', 'BANANA', 'CHERRY'] to deep equal ['APPLE', 'BANANA', 'CHERRY']

PM namespace preserves array types (not String coercion) - Expected [1, 2, 3] to have lengthOf 3
PM namespace preserves array types (not String coercion) - Expected 1 to equal 1
PM namespace preserves array types (not String coercion) - Expected 2 to equal 2
PM namespace preserves array types (not String coercion) - Expected 3 to equal 3
PM namespace preserves object types (not "[object Object]") - Expected 'object' to equal 'object'

PM namespace preserves object types (not "[object Object]") - Expected 42 to equal 42
PM namespace preserves null correctly - Expected null to be null
PM namespace preserves undefined correctly - Expected undefined to be undefined
PM namespace preserves primitives correctly - Expected 'hello' to equal 'hello'
PM namespace preserves primitives correctly - Expected 123 to equal 123
PM namespace preserves primitives correctly - Expected true to equal true

PM namespace preserves nested structures - Expected 'Bob' to equal 'Bob'
PM namespace preserves nested structures - Expected 2 to equal 2
PM namespace preserves nested structures - Expected ['active', 'verified'] to have members ['active', 'verified']

error.message: FetchError: Fetch failed: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND echo.hoppscotch.io

pm.sendRequest() response should have Postman format - Expected null to have property 'body'

testcase.name: crypto.randomUUID() generates valid UUID v4 format - Expected '3a9f9eaa-ff04-46fc-82f7-3c4f7024995c' to be a string
crypto.randomUUID() generates valid UUID v4 format - Expected 36 to equal 36
crypto.randomUUID() generates valid UUID v4 format - Expected true to be true
crypto.getRandomValues() fills array with random bytes - Expected 16 to equal 16
crypto.getRandomValues() fills array with random bytes - Expected true to be true
crypto.subtle.digest() produces SHA-256 hash - Expected 32 to equal 32
crypto.subtle.generateKey() creates HMAC key - Expected 'secret' to equal 'secret'
crypto.subtle.sign() produces HMAC signature - Expected 32 to equal 32
crypto.subtle.verify() validates HMAC signature - Expected true to be true
crypto.subtle.generateKey() creates AES-GCM key - Expected 'secret' to equal 'secret'
crypto.subtle.encrypt() produces ciphertext - Expected 22 to be above 0
crypto.subtle.decrypt() recovers original plaintext - Expected true to be true
crypto.subtle.encrypt() produces RSA ciphertext - Expected 256 to be above 0
crypto.subtle.decrypt() recovers RSA plaintext - Expected true to be true
crypto.subtle.deriveKey() creates AES key from password - Expected 'secret' to equal 'secret'
crypto.randomUUID() generates unique UUIDs - Expected 'd7bfb333-b279-471a-b432-0768c73b0e7a' to not equal 'c0ae0a09-f20f-4b4b-92d4-786b6f25d32b'
crypto.getRandomValues() mutates array in place - Expected '[84, 209, 73, 67, 137, 164, 90, 193, 88, 117]' to equal '[84, 209, 73, 67, 137, 164, 90, 193, 88, 117]'
crypto.getRandomValues() mutates array in place - Expected true to be true
